pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 11 if the source/target version remains at 1.8 while using JDK 11 features or strict compiler checks.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin to a version compatible with Java 11 bytecode.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions (0.7.x) cannot instrument or analyze classes compiled for Java 11, leading to runtime errors during test coverage execution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace javax.inject removed from JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.inject is no longer part of the JDK in Java 11; code using it will fail to compile or run without the explicit dependency.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace javax.annotation removed from JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation is no longer part of the JDK in Java 11; code using it will fail to compile or run without the explicit dependency.
